title: Race-phase pit-window proximity
summary: Add proximity-to-phase features for common pit windows such as one-third distance, halfway, two-thirds distance, and final-quarter pressure.
rationale: External Kaggle discussion highlighted race-track target patterns by RaceProgress, and the run found race phase and remaining-lap estimates useful. Pit strategy is often concentrated around phase windows rather than uniformly across laps.
implementation_hint: Using estimated total laps and current LapNumber, compute distance to common phase marks, indicators for entering each window, and interactions with tyre-pressure features. Keep this as a small feature block and compare against RaceProgress alone.
expected_effect: Small AUC gain with medium confidence; potentially stronger on races with conventional multi-stop windows.
risk: Fixed phase marks may be too generic for special races or safety-car-like disruptions. Do not fit phase marks from public leaderboard feedback.
